items.title: Statistical Inference (Casella & Berger)
items.author: George Casella, Roger L. Berger
items.note: Standard treatment of likelihood, sufficiency, MLE, and the distinction between likelihood and probability.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Links log-likelihood, cross-entropy, and generative models; clear exponential-family view.

items.title: SciPy stats — logpmf and logpdf
items.author: SciPy Developers
items.note: Practical reference for evaluating log-likelihood factors for Binomial, Poisson, Normal, and related laws.
